patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reloading animation on the Rubico Prime when using the Rubico Verv skin.

patchlogs.name: Zephyr & Chroma Prime Vault: Hotfix 31.5.8
patchlogs.fixes:
Rubico Prime
Rubico Prime
Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee Prime and Mirage Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.

patchlogs.name: Call of the Tempestarii: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.0.8 + 30.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Zephyr Prime, Chroma Prime, Tiberon Prime, Kronen Prime, Rubico Prime, and Gram Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Banshee and Mirage Relics in the drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Rubico Prime
Rubico Prime

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.0 + 28.2.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime have entered the Vault!

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Mesa Prime - Hotfix 24.2.2
patchlogs.changes: *Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime Relics are also still out in the wild.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed reload animation issues with the Rubico Prime.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Chroma Prime 23.9.0 + 23.9.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Chroma Prime, Gram Prime, and Rubico Prime Relics have replaced all exclusive locations of Limbo Prime, Destreza Prime, and Pyrana Prime Relics:
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed inability to see new Relics for Chroma/Rubico/Gram Prime in the Codex.
Fixed Rubico Prime icon having an incorrectly placed magazine.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Hotfix 20.6.2
patchlogs.changes: Adjusted the Rubico's left hand placement to fix clipping inside the weapon.

patchlogs.name: Recurring Dreams + Hotfix 1
patchlogs.changes: Rubico, Snipetron series and Vectis series Headshot multiplier returned to their intended 2x multiplier in Conclave

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.9
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Rubico in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18: The Second Dream
patchlogs.fixes: Rubico:  Scope out the enemy with this long-range revolver style rifle.
